entities.name: CROP AREA STATISTICS
entities.description: The generation and analysis of data regarding the area occupied by crops in India

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where crop statistics are generated and analyzed

entities.name: LAND REVENUE SYSTEM
entities.description: A system used to generate crop statistics for major food and non-food crops

entities.name: FOOD CROPS
entities.description: Major crops grown primarily for human consumption

entities.name: NON-FOOD CROPS
entities.description: Crops grown for industrial or other non-consumption purposes

entities.name: SAMPLING TECHNIQUES
entities.description: Various techniques used for the estimation of crop areas

entities.name: REMOTE SENSING
entities.description: Technology used to obtain information about crop areas from a distance

entities.name: GPS
entities.description: Global Positioning System used for precise location and crop area estimation

entities.name: GIS
entities.description: Geographic Information System used for capturing and analyzing spatial crop data

entities.name: CROP AREA ESTIMATION
entities.description: The process of calculating the total land area under specific crop cultivation

entities.name: SMALL AREA ESTIMATION
entities.description: The process of estimating crop area for small, specific geographic regions

entities.name: SATELLITE IMAGES
entities.description: The use of imagery from satellites to estimate crop area

entities.name: GROUND TRUTHS
entities.description: Field-verified data used as a reference to validate satellite-based estimations

entities.name: MIXED CROPPING PATTERN
entities.description: A farming system where multiple crops are grown on the same piece of land, often in fragmented holdings

entities.name: FIELD INVENTORY
entities.description: The process of recording actual crop details through field visits

entities.name: INTEGRATED APPROACH
entities.description: A combined methodology used to conduct field inventories
